email_content.subject: Engineering capacity at DataStack AI — quick observation
email_content.body:
Hi,

Congratulations on your $14M raise — that's a signal your engineering roadmap is about to accelerate.

Teams at your stage typically find that in-house hiring can't keep pace with the roadmap — Tenacious provides dedicated engineering squads that are operational in 2 weeks, not 3 months.

Quick observation from your sector: Top quartile companies in your sector are investing in ML platforms (Snowflake, dbt, Databricks). Your public signal shows limited adoption. Companies with modern data infrastructure ship AI features 3x faster than those without.

Would a 20-minute call this week make sense? I can share what we're seeing from teams at your stage and whether there's a fit.

Best,
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
